name: Julian Tryhard has returned

sheet.name: Julian Tryhard has returned
sheet.background_story:
The Forsaken Lands were so devastated about Julian's demise. He was one of the most famous Pilgrims of all! Julian's incredible stories and adventures will be told for eons. 
BUT, something exciting and fortuitous has happened, Julian's soul has reappeared in this similarily appearing body. What joy will spread when the Pilgrims of the Forsaken Lands hear of this great news! 
The Return of Our Beloved Julian!!!
